title: Copper Tools & Armor BUT GOOD
body:
Ever wanted copper tools and armor but saw that all other available mods were lacking in terms of looks? Fear not, here is a normal good looking copper gear mod to suit your needs.

 

"But mojang decided not to add this to make copper different!"

Yes, and it made copper completely useless... So this decision is something i completely disagree on as historically copper was in fact a major advancement in civilization and is a great middle ground between the hard to get yet useless leather armor and mid game iron armor. We dont talk about chainmail as that for some reason cant be made, ive decided to keep it slightly better than copper armory for the fact it uses iron.
